section.heading: Prohibition on purchase of United States defense contractors by entities controlled by foreign governments

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: No entity controlled by a foreign government may merge with, acquire, or take over a company engaged in interstate commerce in the United States that—

paragraph.content: is performing a Department of Defense contract, or a Department of Energy contract under a national security program, that cannot be performed satisfactorily unless that company is given access to information in a proscribed category of information; or

paragraph.chapeau: during the previous fiscal year, was awarded—

subparagraph.content: Department of Defense prime contracts in an aggregate amount in excess of $500,000,000; or
Department of Energy prime contracts under national security programs in an aggregate amount in excess of $500,000,000.

content.p: The limitation in subsection (a) shall not apply if a merger, acquisition, or takeover is not suspended or prohibited pursuant to section 4565 of this title.

paragraph.chapeau: The term “entity controlled by a foreign government” includes—

subparagraph.content: any domestic or foreign organization or corporation that is effectively owned or controlled by a foreign government; and
any individual acting on behalf of a foreign government,

paragraph.chapeau: The term “proscribed category of information” means a category of information that—

subparagraph.chapeau: with respect to Department of Defense contracts—

clause.content: is determined by the Secretary of Defense to include information the disclosure of which to an entity controlled by a foreign government is not in the national security interests of the United States; and
is defined in regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense for the purposes of this section; and

subparagraph.chapeau: with respect to Department of Energy contracts—

clause.content: is determined by the Secretary of Energy to include information described in subparagraph (A)(ii); and
is defined in regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Energy for the purposes of this section.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 2170a of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
Section was enacted as part of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1993, and not as part of the Defense Production Act of 1950 which comprises this chapter.
